features.name: Parts region rendering
features.notes: Runtime render tree now computes explicit part metrics (top/height/content rect) with deterministic stacking and body stretch behavior.

features.name: Z-order fidelity
features.notes: Object render order resolves from DDR arrange order or component z and is stable with ID tie-break ordering.

features.name: Anchors and resize behavior
features.notes: Anchors are evaluated per part container using baseline-to-current container deltas; missing DDR anchor metadata defaults to top-left with a deterministic wide-object heuristic (`left+right`) for objects spanning most of body width.

features.name: Zoom controls
features.notes: Runtime toolbar includes 50%-200% zoom options; viewport events trigger geometry recompute.

features.name: Diagnostics overlay (rulers/guides)
features.notes: Use ?diag=1 on runtime route to enable geometry grid and hover inspector with anchor/bounds metadata.

features.name: Layout-level anchor overrides
features.notes: Optional overrides are loaded from data/anchorsOverride.json and applied before anchor math execution.

features.name: Theme and style token resolution
features.notes: Deterministic token merge pipeline shipped: theme defaults -> style chain (basedOn) -> object overrides -> runtime overrides.

features.name: Typography rendering rules
features.notes: Font stack mapping, wrap modes (`none|word|char`), text alignment, and vertical alignment are now resolved through FM-style tokens.

features.name: Borders/fills/padding fidelity
features.notes: Fill, border, corner radius, and padding tokens now map through stable cssFromTokens output.

features.name: Style diagnostics inspector
features.notes: Diagnostics overlay now exposes style chain, token values, and per-property source map; includes wireframe and missing-mapping toggles.

features.name: Core object renderers (fields/text/button/image/shape)
features.notes: Runtime now maps core DDR object types to dedicated FM object components with deterministic render behavior.

features.name: Field interaction layers (display/edit/commit)
features.notes: FmField now separates display/edit states and commits via runtime event pipeline.

features.name: Tab order focus behavior
features.notes: Tab key routing advances focus via runtime tab order map and server-side focus patching.

features.name: Field validation hooks
features.notes: Required/number/date/time validations now gate commits and return field-level errors.

features.name: Container field previews
features.notes: Container-like field values render image previews or file-type icon placeholders without exposing raw server URLs in field UI.

knownLimitations: When DDR lacks anchor metadata, defaults and heuristics are used.
Part auto-size/sliding behavior is a best-effort approximation.
Text metric parity remains best effort across browser/OS font engines.
Style inheritance definitions are approximated when DDR does not expose full style class relationships.
